metadata.name: Information Delivery Process
metadata.description: Lifecycle-oriented information delivery workflow in the ISO 19650 draft, emphasizing information purposes, requirements, production and exchange to support decisions.
metadata.author: ISO19650 Knowledge Maps

nodes.label: Lifecycle Decision
nodes.description: Decision taken during the lifecycle of an asset which requires supporting information.

nodes.label: Information Purpose
nodes.description: Reason why information is required to support a lifecycle decision.

nodes.label: Information Requirement
nodes.description: Specification of information needed to fulfill an information purpose.

nodes.label: Information Production Planning
nodes.description: Planning how information will be produced by information production teams.

nodes.label: Information Production
nodes.description: Creation and coordination of information to meet defined requirements.

nodes.label: Information Verification
nodes.description: Checking and validating information before exchange.

nodes.label: Information Exchange
nodes.description: Transfer of verified information between stakeholders.

nodes.label: Information Model
nodes.description: Structured collection of information containers used to support decisions.

nodes.label: Common Data Environment
nodes.description: Shared information environment used to manage and exchange information.

evidence.quote: Information is required to support decision-making during the lifecycle of assets.
Information is only specified and produced in response to one or more clear information purposes.
Information production should be planned to meet defined information requirements.
Information production is planned and carried out by information production teams.
Information should be checked and validated prior to being exchanged.
Verified information is exchanged between stakeholders to support decisions.
Information models are collections of information containers supporting decision-making.
The common data environment is the agreed source of information for the asset or project.
Information exchanges provide the information required for lifecycle decision-making.
